posts.author: ShadowWalker92
posts.text: @FragileFlower has been following me for days now. Yesterday they showed up at my apartment door without knocking and screamed insults in the hallway. Today they posted a screenshot of my private messages to a group chat, tagging me as 'crazy' and demanding I delete my account or they'll expose more of my history. They keep DMing me threats about ruining my reputation online.
posts.explanation: This case involves sustained stalking and repeated unwanted contact rather than a one-off insult. The target is being subjected to coordinated brigading and harassment that escalates beyond normal disagreement, requiring specialist review to assess the severity of the threats and privacy violations.
